ModMetadata.Name: Spray Paint Plus [StationeersLaunchPad]
ModMetadata.Author: SixFive7
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]Spray Paint Plus[/h1]
Combines color cycling, network painting, and infinite spray paint into one mod that now also fully supports multiplayer.
[h2]Features[/h2] [list] [*]Scroll wheel to cycle spray can colors [*]Spray paints entire pipe/cable/chute networks [*]Spray paints all walls bounding the same room [*]Spray paints connected frames, girders, and other large structures in a grid [*]Hold Shift to paint single item (or swap with config) [*]Hold Ctrl for checkered pattern [*]Infinite spray paint uses (configurable) [*]No spray paint pollution (configurable) [*]All settings configurable via mod settings panel [*]Full multiplayer support — all players must have this mod installed [/list]
[h2]Requirements[/h2] [list] [*][url=https://docs.bepinex.dev/]BepInEx[/url] [*][url=https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad]StationeersLaunchPad[/url] [/list]
[h2]Incompatible With[/h2] [list] [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3163662298]Color Cycler[/url] by Elmotrix [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2876605527]Network Painter[/url] by Elmotrix [*][url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3576112002]Infinite Spray Paint[/url] by Aspct (redundant — disable to avoid confusion) [/list]
[h2]Reporting Issues[/h2] If you run into a bug or something behaves unexpectedly, please open an issue on [url=https://github.com/SixFive7/SprayPaintPlus/issues]GitHub[/url] — it would be greatly appreciated. Steam comment notifications don't always come through, so GitHub is the reliable way to make sure a report is seen.
[h2]Credits[/h2] Built on the work of Elmotrix (Color Cycler, Network Painter), SubHobo (multiplayer networking), Aspct (Infinite Spray Paint), and Dingo (original Infinite Paint).
[url=https://github.com/SixFive7/SprayPaintPlus]Source Code on GitHub[/url]
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: v1.2.0: Paint whole rooms and whole frame grids - NEW: Painting a wall now paints all same-type walls bounding the same room - NEW: Painting a frame, girder, or other large structure paints all orthogonally-connected structures of the exact same type - NEW: Server toggles for each — "Network Paint Walls" and "Network Paint Large Structures" (both default on) - Shift still restricts to the single targeted item; Ctrl still produces a checkered pattern v1.1.1: Modifier keys for clients - FIX: Shift / Ctrl modifiers now apply correctly when remote clients paint. Previously the server read the host's keyboard for every client's paint action, so clients' modifiers were ignored (always behaved as if nothing was held) - Skip redundant client-side network-paint prefix for non-spray paint paths (cosmetic-only, did not propagate) - REQUIRES: All players on a server must run 1.1.1 (wire format change in the modifier message) v1.1.0: LaunchPadBooster Networking V2 - CHANGE: Migrated to the new Networking V2 API (dedicated channel, automatic compression, multi-packet splitting) - CHANGE: Explicitly enforce matching mod versions during the multiplayer handshake - REQUIRES: StationeersLaunchPad with LaunchPadBooster v0.2.0 or newer v1.0.0: Initial release - Combines Color Cycler, Network Painter, and Infinite Spray Paint into one multiplayer-safe mod - Scroll to cycle spray can colors; hold Shift to paint a single item; hold Ctrl for checkered pattern - Network painting for pipes, cables, and chutes with per-type toggles - Infinite spray paint uses and pollution suppression (server-side toggles) - Conflict detection against the three original mods
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: Spray Paint Plus Combines color cycling, network painting, and infinite spray paint into one mod. Features: - Scroll wheel to cycle spray can colors - Spray paints entire pipe/cable/chute networks - Spray paints all walls bounding the same room - Spray paints connected frames and other large structures in a grid - Hold Shift to paint single item (or swap with config) - Hold Ctrl for checkered pattern - Infinite spray paint uses (configurable) - No spray paint pollution (configurable) Settings: All features are configurable via the mod settings panel. Server settings control gameplay for all players. Client settings (scroll direction, single/network default) are personal. Requirements: BepInEx + StationeersLaunchPad Multiplayer: All players must have this mod installed. Incompatible with: Color Cycler, Network Painter. Disable Infinite Spray Paint too if installed (redundant).
